screenshotupload-desc: Lets users paste, crop and annotate screenshots and upload them to the wiki, both from Special:Upload and directly while editing a page.
screenshotupload-dropzone-label: Paste or drop a screenshot here
screenshotupload-dropzone-hint: Press Ctrl+V to paste a screenshot from the clipboard, or drag an image file into this area. You can crop and annotate it before uploading.
screenshotupload-error-notimage: That does not look like an image. Please paste or drop a screenshot.
screenshotupload-error-toolarge: The screenshot is too large. The maximum size is $1 MB.
screenshotupload-form-warning: Upload not completed ($1). Tick "Ignore any warnings" and submit again to override.
screenshotupload-editor-exists: A file with that name already exists; uploading under a new name.
screenshotupload-editor-form-hint: A file tag was inserted at your cursor. Complete the upload in the new tab to publish the screenshot.
screenshotupload-editor-openupload: Open the upload page for this screenshot
